ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the country (e.g., Afghanistan) */,
  "long_name" TEXT /* Long name of the country (e.g., Islamic Republic of Afghanistan) */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code for the country (e.g., 93) */,
  "iso_2" TEXT /* ISO 2-letter code for the country (e.g., AF) */,
  "cctld" TEXT /* Internet country-code top-level domain (ccTLD) for the country (e.g., .af) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country's currency */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag image */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., Republic, Monarchy) */,
  "head_of_state" TEXT /* Name of the head of state */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  "gdp_usd" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product in US dollars */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "un_membership" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country's ID in the countries table */,
  "un_member" INTEGER /* Whether the country is a member of the United Nations (yes/no) */,
  "date_of_admission" TEXT /* Date when the country was admitted to the UN */,
  "un_member_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of UN membership (e.g., member, observer, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's ID in the users table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_additional_data" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country's ID in the countries table */,
  "data_key" TEXT /* Key for the additional data (e.g., GDP, population) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the additional data */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type's ID in the data_types table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data value is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "data_key"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_additional_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., GDP, population) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type (e.g., billion USD, million people) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., World Bank, UN) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country's ID in the countries table */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type's ID in the data_types table */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data for the country and year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data value is applicable */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data value (e.g., World Bank, UN) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data value was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's ID in the users table */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country's ID in the countries table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the country data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
